---
title: "Content to support my course, *Data Science with R*"
description: This is the place to find data sets and other supporting documents for my YouTube course, *Data Science with R*, at least until I can build something more permanent.
author:
  - name: Andrew Gard
date: 11-10-2025
categories: [dplyr, ggplot2] 
image: "data manipulation thumb.png"
draft: false 
comments:
  utterances:
    repo: equitable-equations/website
---

Looking for data and other documents supporting that YouTube video you saw of mine? You've come to the right place.

- Data manipulation with R:

  {{< downloadthis "_internal/data manipulation with R.html" label="Download html notes" dname="html_notes">}}
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/data manipulation with R.qmd" label="Download quarto notes" dname="quarto_notes">}}  

- Getting started with ggplot:

  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Getting started with ggplot2.html" label="Download html notes" dname="html_notes">}}
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Getting started with ggplot2.qmd" label="Download quarto notes" dname="quarto_notes">}}  

- Single-variable plots with ggplot2:

  {{< downloadthis "_internal/single variable plots in R.html" label="Download html notes" dname="html_notes">}}
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/single variable plots in R.qmd" label="Download quarto notes" dname="quarto_notes">}}
  
- Quantitative vs categorical plots with ggplot2:  

  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Quantitative vs categorical plots with ggplot2.html" label="Download html notes" dname="html_notes">}}
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Quantitative vs categorical plots with ggplot2.qmd" label="Download quarto notes" dname="quarto_notes">}}
  
- Introducing the pipe:
  
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Grouped summaries.html" label="Download html notes" dname="html_notes">}}
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Grouped summaries.qmd" label="Download quarto notes" dname="quarto_notes">}}  
  
- Grouped summaries in R:

  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Introducing the pipe.html" label="Download html notes" dname="html_notes">}}
  {{< downloadthis "_internal/Introducing the pipe.qmd" label="Download quarto notes" dname="quarto_notes">}}
